message:
fix(vdbe): IS TRUE/FALSE emit IsTrue opcode + add 20 conformance tests

`a IS TRUE` was incorrectly compiled as `a IS 1` (Eq with NULLEQ),
which fails for non-zero values like -1. Now detects IS/IS NOT with
Literal::True/False RHS and emits the IsTrue opcode with correct
(p3,p4) parameters across all three codegen paths (emit_upsert_expr,
emit_expr_with_fallback, emit_is_comparison) and the eval_join_expr
fallback path.

Also fixed: BinaryOp::Is/IsNot in eval_join_binary_op was falling
through to `_ => Null` — now returns correct NULLEQ comparison result.

New conformance tests: last_insert_rowid/changes, multi ORDER BY,
nested CASE+agg, savepoint rollback, numeric overflow, complex
subqueries, UPDATE/DELETE conditions, UPDATE FROM, recursive CTE,
INSERT...SELECT, multi-condition JOIN, RETURNING, IS/IS NOT patterns,
COALESCE/NULLIF columns, multi-column PK, aggregate DISTINCT, mixed
type storage, expression aliases, IF NOT EXISTS, printf specifiers.

Core: 2022 pass, 0 fail, 3 ignored. Clippy + fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
